titleStmt.title: SII 15.239: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 239. (B.K. No. 107 of 1926-27.) HOSŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall of the Śiva temple.

It records the gift of income derived from the taxes Hejjuṅka and Bīravaṇa for lamp, worship and offerings, to the god Mūlasthana, by Nāgadēva and Kēśava, Pegga�es of the tax officer Bīcharasa. The latter is stated to have been a subordinate of the governor of the area, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chāvuṇḍa who might be the Sinda chief of that name.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

daḷīdaṁḍavēdaṁḍaṁ kadanapracaṁḍaṁ nuḍidantegaṇḍaṁ vīra cāvuṇḍarasaru . ka . sthiradiṁ
rājyaṁ geyyuttire tatupādāṁbujōpajīvi camūpābharaṇaṁ śrī
suṁkada bīcarasaṁ vibhudaikamaṁḍanaṁ dharegesadaṁ . Ātana pe¨rggaḍegaḷu vikhyātaya
śōnnatinipuṇaracaḷitavākya¨rbbhūtaḻadoḷu negaḷda¨rmmahī
¨rnnāgadēvanuṁ kēśavanuṁ . Ā mahānubhāva¨rttamage naḍeva ha
jjuṁka bīravaṇamumaṁ śrī mūlastānadēvaraṁgabhōgakkeṁdā dēvara
soḍalege sa¨rvvanamasyaṁ sa¨rvvabādhāparihāramāgi biṭṭar .
worn out
Digital edition of SII 15.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
